    Search your deck for a Stadium card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

  • Card Type / HP / Stage:Water / 280 / VSTAR

    During your turn, you may attach up to 3 Water Energy cards from your discard pile to your Water Pokémon in any way you like. (You can’t use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game.)

    This attack does 20 more damage for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s).
